name: codex-bridge
description: Cross-runtime plugin demonstrator — ships one strict-mode SKILL.md (agents-md-author) installable in both Anthropic Claude Code and OpenAI Codex CLI from the same source.
author: Anton Abyzov <anton.abyzov@gmail.com>

interface.shortDescription: Generate AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md for any AI coding tool
interface.longDescription: Reference implementation of vskill's dual-manifest pattern. Ships one skill, agents-md-author, that bootstraps cross-vendor project instructions (AGENTS.md for Codex, CLAUDE.md for Claude Code) from a single source. Frontmatter is deliberately strict (name + description only) so the same SKILL.md works in any tool that adopted the Anthropic Agent Skills open spec.
defaultPrompt: Bootstrap AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md for this project using the agents-md-author skill.
